statement.headerDoc:
STEP 964 — Number Fields, L-functions and Automorphic Forms
  藤本伸樹 2026-04-21

  Five open problems connecting number theory, L-functions and automorphic forms:

  A. LANGLANDS PROGRAM (overarching framework)
     Automorphic representations of GL_n correspond to Galois representations.
     STATUS: Known cases: GL_2 (Wiles, Taylor-Wiles), many rank 1 results.
     Open: functoriality conjecture for general reductive groups.

  B. RAMANUJAN CONJECTURE → THEOREM (Deligne 1974)
     |τ(p)| ≤ 2p^{11/2} for the Ramanujan τ function.
     More generally: Satake parameters of cuspidal automorphic fo
